data.title: GREEN: Add --without-tag flag to sprint-list-epics.sh
data.description: Implement --without-tag=<tag> filter in sprint-list-epics.sh. When provided, exclude epics whose tags include the given value. Symmetric with --has-tag flag added by b8f4-02a9. Enables: sprint-list-epics.sh --min-children=1 --without-tag=brainstorm:complete for scrutiny-gap query. testing_mode: GREEN
